name: agent_capability_phase33_windows_native_diagnostics
prompt_lines: 请执行一次 Phase 33 Windows Computer Use native provider diagnostics 验收：只使用静态窗口、fake native provider 和 helper.status，不读取真实桌面，不移动鼠标，不点击真实桌面。最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE33_WINDOWS_NATIVE_DIAGNOSTICS_READY。

你必须调用终端工具执行这个安全命令验证协议：$env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.native_helper import NativeWindowCaptureResult, NativeWindowTextResult, WindowsNativeWindowObservationHelper; FakeCapture=type('FakeCapture',(object,),{'status':lambda self:{'backend':'visible_fake_capture','available':True,'reason':'phase33 visible fake capture'},'capture_window':lambda self,hwnd:NativeWindowCaptureResult(captured=True,screenshot_bytes=b'phase33-visible-bmp',screenshot_format='bmp',screenshot_width=333,screenshot_height=144,backend='visible_fake_capture',reason='captured '+str(hwnd))}); FakeText=type('FakeText',(object,),{'status':lambda self:{'backend':'visible_fake_text','available':True,'reason':'phase33 visible fake text'},'read_window_text':lambda self,hwnd:NativeWindowTextResult(captured=True,accessibility_text='安全文本',focused_element='edit '+str(hwnd),selected_text='',document_text='安全文档',backend='visible_fake_text',reason='text '+str(hwnd))}); helper=WindowsNativeWindowObservationHelper(capture_provider=FakeCapture(), text_provider=FakeText(), platform='win32'); diagnostics=helper.status()['diagnostics']; capture_names=[p['name'] for p in diagnostics['capture']['providers']]; text_names=[p['name'] for p in diagnostics['text']['providers']]; wgc_known='windows_graphics_capture' in capture_names; uia_known='uiautomation_client' in text_names; safe=diagnostics['safe_observe_only']; actions_expanded=diagnostics['real_input_actions_expanded']; active_capture=diagnostics['capture']['active_provider']; active_text=diagnostics['text']['active_provider']; assert diagnostics['diagnostics_version']=='phase33_windows_native_diagnostics' and wgc_known and uia_known and safe and not actions_expanded and active_capture=='visible_fake_capture' and active_text=='visible_fake_text'; print('PHASE33_WINDOWS_NATIVE_DIAGNOSTICS_OK phase='+diagnostics['diagnostics_version']+' wgc_known='+str(wgc_known).lower()+' uia_known='+str(uia_known).lower()+' active_capture='+active_capture+' active_text='+active_text+' safe='+str(safe).lower()+' actions_expanded='+str(actions_expanded).lower())"

不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE33_WINDOWS_NATIVE_DIAGNOSTICS_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE33_WINDOWS_NATIVE_DIAGNOSTICS_READY PHASE33_WINDOWS_NATIVE_DIAGNOSTICS_OK phase=phase33_windows_native_diagnostics wgc_known=true uia_known=true active_capture=visible_fake_capture active_text=visible_fake_text safe=true actions_expanded=false
